# Try to open the expected file
import os, json, re, textwrap, sys, pathlib
paths = ["/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt", "/mnt/data/file-W6tiAgdEBSBV3HFuAJxkuF-Q095.txt"]
content = None
for p in paths:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        with open(p, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            content = f.read()
        print("Loaded:", p, "length:", len(content))
        break
print(content[:500] if content else "No file found")

import re
len(content)
# find all quoted segments between Arabic quotes "
matches = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]*)"', content, flags=re.DOTALL)]
len(matches), matches[:3]

queries: What is the Arabic text of Surah Al-A'raf verses 85-88? الأعراف 85-88 Arabic text
What is the Arabic text of Surah Hud verse 94? هود 94
What is the Arabic text of Surah Hud verses 95-96? هود 95 96
"وَلَمَّا جَاءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا شُعَيْبًا" نص الآية
قَالَ الْمَلَأُ الَّذِينَ اسْتَكْبَرُوا مِنْ قَوْمِهِ لَنُخْرِجَنَّكَ يَا شُعَيْبُ الأعراف 88

output.code:
# Compute spans excluding quotes for each match found
import re
matches = [(m.start(), m.end(), m.group(0)) for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]*)"', content, flags=re.DOTALL)]
spans = []
for s, e, txt in matches:
    inner = content[s+1:e-1]
    spans.append({'start': s+1, 'end': e-1, 'text': inner})
spans

# Build the citations JSON structure using the spans found and corrected text (manually filled from trusted source).
citations = []

# 1) Al-A'raf 85-88
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[0]['start'],
    "span_end": spans[0]['end'],
    "span_text": spans[0]['text'],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "الأعراف", "sura_number": 7, "aya_number": 85},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": ("وَإِلَىٰ مَدْيَنَ أَخَاهُمْ شُعَيْبًا ۗ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُمْ مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ ۖ قَدْ جَاءَتْكُمْ بَيِّنَةٌ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ ۖ فَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ وَالْمِيزَانَ وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا النَّاسَ أَشْيَاءَهُمْ وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلَاحِهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ "
                       "وَلَا تَقْعُدُوا بِكُلِّ صِرَاطٍ تُوعِدُونَ وَتَصُدُّونَ عَنْ سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ مَنْ آمَنَ بِهِ وَتَبْغُونَهَا عِوَجًا ۚ وَاذْكُرُوا إِذْ كُنْتُمْ قَلِيلًا فَكَثَّرَكُمْ ۖ وَانْظُرُوا كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ الْمُفْسِدِينَ "
                       "وَإِنْ كَانَ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْكُمْ آمَنُوا بِالَّذِي أُرْسِلْتُ بِهِ وَطَائِفَةٌ لَمْ يُؤْمِنُوا فَاصْبِرُوا حَتَّىٰ يَحْكُمَ اللَّهُ بَيْنَنَا ۚ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ الْحَاكِمِينَ "
                       "قَالَ الْمَلَأُ الَّذِينَ اسْتَكْبَرُوا مِنْ قَوْمِهِ لَنُخْرِجَنَّكَ يَا شُعَيْبُ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَكَ مِنْ قَرْيَتِنَا أَوْ لَتَعُودُنَّ فِي مِلَّتِنَا ۚ قَالَ أَوَلَوْ كُنَّا كَارِهِينَ"),
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 2) Hud 94
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[1]['start'],
    "span_end": spans[1]['end'],
    "span_text": spans[1]['text'],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "هود", "sura_number": 11, "aya_number": 94},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": ("وَلَمَّا جَاءَ أَمْرُنَا نَجَّيْنَا شُعَيْبًا وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَهُ بِرَحْمَةٍ مِنَّا "
                       "وَأَخَذَتِ الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا الصَّيْحَةُ فَأَصْبَحُوا فِي دِيَارِهِمْ جَاثِمِينَ"),
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# 3) Hud 95-96
citations.append({
    "span_start": spans[2]['start'],
    "span_end": spans[2]['end'],
    "span_text": spans[2]['text'],
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": False,
    "aya_reference": {"sura_name": "هود", "sura_number": 11, "aya_number": 95},
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": ("كَأَنْ لَمْ يَغْنَوْا فِيهَا ۗ أَلَا بُعْدًا لِمَدْيَنَ كَمَا بَعِدَتْ ثَمُودُ "
                       "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مُوسَىٰ بِآيَاتِنَا وَسُلْطَانٍ مُبِينٍ"),
    "completely_invalid": False
})

print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
